examples: We are cognizant of the problem.
In a grid environment, we have to be cognizant of the fact that people around the world may eventually tap into these applications.
At the same time, I'm cognizant of the need for people to be insured.
Please be cognizant of the fact that not everyone gets to speak at every event.
Cognizant of past fiascoes, the GAO strongly makes the argument to discontinue the paper dollar.
